title: Waxed & Shiny
description: Adds Wax, Tall Candle, Wax Blocks and Wax Pillars. along with the ability to wax and unwax some blocks!
body:
![Waxed & Shiny Logo](https://imgur.com/WseAdvF.png) [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/zpKwRpZ.png)](https://discord.gg/t9csvzqSYb) [![Twitter/X](https://i.imgur.com/pGJbNvS.png)](https://X.com/I_AmMaker) [![Patreon](https://i.imgur.com/sA2zMrl.png)](https://www.patreon.com/makers_mods)
# Video showcasing the mod: ## Note:This mod **DOES NOT** require Dye Depot, but it's optional! # **New Blocks:** - **Empty Honeycomb Block** *(Obtained by using a Glass Bottle on Honeycomb Block)* - **Wax Block** - **Wax Pillars** *(You can put Wick on top of them to make a big candle)* - **Tall Candles** - **Waxed Sand/Red Sand/Gravel** *(They aren't affected by gravity)* - **Waxed Concrete Powder** *(They aren't affected by gravity and won't be affected by water)* - **Waxed Sponge** *(It will not absorb water)* # **New Items:** - **Wax** *(Works like Honeycomb)* - **Wick** --- # **Compatibility:** - [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) - [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/Supplementaries) - [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/Supplementaries-Squared) - [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/Upgrade-Aquatic) - [I Wanna Skate](https://modrinth.com/mod/I-Wanna-Skate) - [Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees)
